title: DeleteEntityResponse
description: Response emitted by `sqlite-graphrag delete-entity --json` on stdout as a single JSON line.

entity_name.description: Name of the entity that was permanently removed.

namespace.description: Namespace in which the entity was deleted.

relationships_removed.description: Number of graph relationships (edges) removed along with the entity.

bindings_removed.description: Number of memory-entity binding rows removed along with the entity.
